comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Waltz in 3/4 time. Verse (Tempo di Valse Viennoise) + Refrain. Verse has moderate OCR errors. Refrain has several GAP measures and stacked verses in m54-56. Pipeline missing m37 entirely. Many measures in interlude/coda (m69-74, m83-84) are piano-only.

1.comment: Pipeline had no lyrics on 1n. PDF: 'A-' pickup syllable on beat 3. Pipeline missed it.

2.comment: Pipeline had ['way', 'with', 'the'] on 3n. PDF: 'way with the' — correct.

3.comment: Pipeline had ['mu', 'sic', 'of'] on 3n. PDF: 'mu-sic of' — correct.

4.comment: Pipeline had ['way'] on 2n. PDF: 'Broad-way!__' — 2 syllables on 2 notes. Pipeline only has 1.

5.comment: Pipeline had ['Be'] on 2n. PDF: 'Be' as pickup — but 2 notes. Second note is tied/rest.

9.comment: Pipeline had ['Written', 'Oh'] on 2n. PDF: '— Oh,' as pickup. 'Written' is from the footnote text '*Written for...' — stage direction/footnote contamination. Only 'Oh,' is a real lyric.

10.comment: Pipeline had ['Id', 'give', 'no'] on 3n. PDF: 'I'd give no' — missing apostrophe.

11.comment: Pipeline had ['thar', 'ter', 'to'] on 3n. PDF: 'quar-ter to' — OCR garble 'thar' for 'quar'.

17.comment: GAP 1n+2rests. PDF: 'tin.__' held/tied from m16 then rest. Actually the '—' after 'tin.' means 'How' pickup is in m17. PDF shows 'How' on beat 3. Pipeline has 1 note, 2 rests.

23.comment: Pipeline had ['night', 'club', 'hing'] on 3n. PDF: 'night-club-bing' — OCR 'hing' for 'bing'.

24.comment: Pipeline had ['sous', 'es.'] on 2n. PDF: 'sous-es.__' — 'sous' should have hyphen continuation. Actually 'sous-es.' is correct as rendered. Pipeline OK but missing period placement. Actually 'sous-es.' on 2n is fine.

27.comment: Pipeline had ['n ,', 'free', 'eas', 'y'] on 4n. PDF: "free 'n' eas-y" — OCR garble 'n ,' for "'n'". 4 syllables on 4 notes.

36.comment: Pipeline had ["Strauss's"] on 1n. PDF: 'Strauss's!__' — held note. Missing exclamation mark.

38.comment: Pipeline had ['Ya.'] on 1n. PDF: 'Ya,' — period should be comma.

41.comment: Pipeline had ['Give', 'me'] on 3n. PDF: 'Give me' — but only 2 lyrics on 3 notes. Third note is rest/pickup area. Pipeline count is 3n but only 2 lyric syllables — correct.

42.comment: Pipeline had ['m'] on 1n with direction 'ma.' — OCR split. PDF: 'oom-' on held note. Actually 'oom' is the syllable.

43.comment: Pipeline had ['pah'] on 1n with direction 'm'. PDF: '- pah' on held note. Correct syllable but pipeline direction garble.

45.comment: GAP 1n. PDF: 'pah!__' continuation. Actually m44 has 'pah!' and m45 is interlude. Looking at PDF p3: after 'pah - pah!' there's an interlude with double bar into Refrain. m45 = 1n in interlude. No lyric expected on interlude note.

46.comment: Pipeline had ['want', 'a'] on 2n. PDF: 'When I want a' — Refrain starts. But pipeline has 2n+2rests. 'want a' on the 2 notes is plausible but 'When I' is missing. These may be pickup notes.

48.comment: Pipeline had ['ing', 'through', 'the'] on 3n. PDF: 'lilt-ing through the' — pipeline missing 'lilt' prefix. But only 3n. 'ing' is continuation syllable — correct for these 3 notes.

52.comment: Pipeline had ['By'] on 2n. PDF: 'By Strauss!__' — 2 notes, 'By' on first, held note. But 'Strauss!' should be on second note. Pipeline only has 1 lyric on 2n.

53.comment: GAP 1n. PDF: 'Strauss!__' held note or 'It' pickup. Looking at PDF p4: after 'By Strauss!' there's 'It' as new phrase. m53 = 1n.

54.comment: STACKED: Pipeline had ['di', 'It', 'Valse'] on 2n. 'Valse' is from stage direction 'Tempo di Valse'. 'It' is from stacked verse. PDF v1: 'laughs!' on 2n (but 'laughs!' is 1 syllable on held note). Actually looking at PDF p4: 'It laughs! it sings!' — m54 should have 'laughs!' area. Pipeline has 2n.

55.comment: STACKED: Pipeline had ['laughs', 'I .', 'it', 'want'] on 2n. Garbled mix of v1 and refrain repeat. PDF v1: 'it' on first note (pickup), then rest.

56.comment: STACKED: Pipeline had ['sings!', 'a', 'The'] on 2n. PDF v1: 'sings! The' — 'a' is from stacked refrain. 2 syllables on 2 notes.

62.comment: Pipeline had ['Let', 'th'] on 2n. PDF: 'Let the' — OCR truncated 'the' to 'th'.

63.comment: Pipeline had ['flow', 'a', 'long'] on 3n. PDF: '"Da-nube" flow a-long' — but only 3n in pipeline. 'flow a long' = 'flow a-long' is correct for 3 notes.

64.comment: Pipeline had ['Fle', 'der'] on 3n. PDF: 'And the "Fle-der-' — 3 syllables on 3n. Pipeline missing 'And the' but only has 3n. Actually looking at m64: pipeline says 3n+2rests. PDF: 'And the Fle-der-' — wait, the 'And the' is at end of m63 or start of m64? Let me look at count: pipeline m63=3n, m64=3n+2rests. 'flow a-long' fills m63. 'And the Fle-der-' = 4 syllables but m64 has 3n. So 'And' may be in a rest area. Providing 3.

65.comment: Pipeline had ['maus'] on 1n. PDF: '-maus!"' — correct continuation.

69.comment: GAP 1n. PDF: 'By Strauss!__' area — interlude/coda. Looking at PDF p5: after 'By Strauss!__' there's instrumental then 'By Jo! By Jing!' Pipeline has 1n with no lyrics. This may be held 'Strauss!' note.

70.comment: GAP — pipeline 2n+1rest. PDF: instrumental interlude. No lyrics expected.

71.comment: GAP — pipeline 2n. PDF: instrumental interlude area.

72.comment: GAP — pipeline 2n. PDF: instrumental interlude area.

73.comment: GAP — pipeline 3n. PDF: 'By Jo! By Jing!' area. But these notes may be piano. Looking at PDF: 'By Jo!' text appears in vocal line. 3 notes.

74.comment: GAP — pipeline 3n+2rests. PDF: 'Jing! "By Strauss" is the thing!' — but pipeline has 3n. 'Jing!' on 1 note then 2 rests.

75.comment: Pipeline had ['ha', 'cha', 'By'] on 3n. PDF: 'So I say to ha-cha-cha__' — but pipeline only has 3n for 'ha-cha-cha' area. Wait, PDF shows 'mp calmo Fdim' direction area then 'So I say to' as pickup then 'ha-cha-cha__'. Pipeline 3n: 'ha' 'cha' then 'By' which is wrong — 'By' belongs later. Actually looking at m75: 'ha-cha-cha' is 3 syllables on 3 notes (with tied note carrying into next measure).

76.comment: Pipeline had ['Her'] on 1n. PDF: 'Her-aus!' — 'Her' on held note. Pipeline correct for 1n.

77.comment: Pipeline had ['aus!'] on 1n. PDF: '-aus!' continuation — correct.

78.comment: Pipeline had ['Just', 'give', 'me', 'a'] on 5n. PDF: 'Just give me a' — but only 4 lyrics on 5n. Actually 'Just give me a' = 4 words. Pipeline has 4 on 5n. One note is a rest or tied. 4 lyrics on 5 notes is fine.

79.comment: Pipeline had ['to', 'pah', 'pah'] on 3n. PDF: 'oom-pah-pah' — 'to' should be 'oom'.

80.comment: Pipeline had ['By'] on 2n. PDF: '— By' — 1 lyric syllable. Pipeline has 2n; first is tied/held.

82.comment: Pipeline had ['When', 'want', 'a'] on 3n. PDF: 'When I want a' — but 4 syllables on 3n+2rests. Pipeline missing 'I'. Providing best 3 for 3n.

83.comment: GAP 1n. PDF: 'a' continuation from m82 or first ending pickup. Looking at PDF p5: 1st ending bracket shows 'When I want a' then m83-84 area. 1n here.

84.comment: GAP 2n+1rest. PDF: 1st ending area 'Strauss.' and instrumental. No lyrics clearly assignable to this pipeline measure since endings cause confusion.
